title: Night {number}
subtitle: The arena falls silent as darkness covers the tributes.

events.text: {name} starts a fire.
{name} sets up camp for the night.
{name} loses sight of where they are.
{name} climbs a tree to rest.
{name} goes to sleep.
{name} sees a fire, but stays hidden.
{name} scouts around the arena.
{name} passes out from exhaustion.
{name} cooks their food before putting their fire out.
{name} thinks about home.
{name} tends to their wounds.
{name} quietly hums.
{name} questions their sanity.
{name} receives fresh food from an unknown sponsor.
{name} tries to sing themselves to sleep.
{name} receives a hatchet from an unknown sponsor.
{name} screams for help.
{name} receives clean water from an unknown sponsor.
{name} looks at the night sky.
{name} receives medical supplies from an unknown sponsor.
{name} makes a slingshot.
{name} sharpens their blade by moonlight.
{name} wraps themselves in leaves to stay warm.
{name} stays awake all night listening for footsteps.
{name} prays to whatever gods they believe in.
{name} breaks down crying but pulls themselves together before dawn.
{name} eats the last of their rations and stares into the darkness.
{name} sets up a perimeter of noise traps around their camp.
{name} talks to themselves to stay awake.
{name} and {name2} huddle for warmth.
{name} and {name2} run into each other and decide to truce for the night.
{name} and {name2} talk about the tributes still alive.
{name} and {name2} sleep in shifts.
{name} and {name2} hold hands.
{name} and {name2} share their rations quietly under the stars.
{name} keeps watch while {name2} sleeps.
{name} and {name2} argue over whether to move camp.
{name} convinces {name2} to turn back from hunting tonight.
{name}, {name2}, and {name3} sleep in shifts.
{name}, {name2}, and {name3} discuss the games and what might happen in the morning.
{name}, {name2}, {name3}, and {name4} sleep in shifts.
{name} unknowingly eats toxic berries.
{name} is unable to start a fire and freezes to death.
{name} bleeds out due to untreated injuries.
{name} dies trying to escape the arena.
{name} dies from hypothermia.
{name} falls from a tree while sleeping and doesn't survive the landing.
{name} is ambushed by a mutt and torn apart before they can scream.
{name} is found by the Gamemakers' hover drones, dead of unknown causes.
{name} kills {name2} while they are sleeping.
{name} stabs {name2} with a tree branch.
{name} strangles {name2} with a rope.
{name} convinces {name2} not to kill them, only to kill them instead.
{name} severely slices {name2} with a sword.
{name} plunges a knife into {name2}'s chest as they sleep.
{name} caves {name2}'s skull in with a rock.
{name} ambushes {name2} and slits their throat in the dark.
{name} shoots {name2} through the heart with an arrow before they can react.
{name} lures {name2} toward a noise, then drives a spear through them.
{name} and {name2} fight in the dark and both end up dead.
{name} attempts to climb a tree, but falls on {name2}, killing them both.
{name} and {name2} work together to drown {name3}.
{name} and {name2} sneak into {name3}'s camp and kill them silently.
{name} and {name2} pin {name3} down and stab them repeatedly.
